response.justification: Bogdan possesses a strong background in full-stack development, cloud platforms (AWS), and distributed systems, coupled with proven technical leadership and a commitment to engineering excellence. While he doesn't explicitly demonstrate 8+ years of dedicated production-grade AI solution development, his current/future role at Naver directly involves AI-agent infrastructure, Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators, and agentic workflows, which are highly relevant to this position. His extensive experience in designing integrations, building robust systems, and mentoring makes him a strong candidate with foundational skills transferable to a Forward Deployed Engineer role in GenAI.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP, and agentic workflows.
Extensive background in full-stack, cloud (AWS), and distributed systems engineering.
Proven technical leadership, mentoring, and strong software craftsmanship practices.
concerns: Lack of explicit 8+ years of production-grade AI solution development experience.
No explicit mention of vector databases or RAG architectures.
Limited explicit experience with LLM performance metrics and optimization techniques.
